title: Changelog
subtitle: A detailed record of all updates and improvements made to the application.

features.upload_improvements: New way to upload multiple photos in a single request, optimizing the process and reducing server load. Simultaneous processing of all images.
features.upload_results: Completely redesigned to provide better information about successes, duplicates, and errors. Improved navigation and visualization of thumbnails, locations, and dates.
features.batch_upload: Now you can apply labels directly to all ZIP photos during upload, which simplifies mass organization and categorization.

improvements.map_interactions: Greater fluidity in panning, zooming, and marker clustering on maps. Better performance and precision when displaying photo locations.
improvements.photo_filters: More intuitive and faster filters, with better integration between locations, dates, and labels. Immediate response when changing any criteria.
improvements.error_handling: Clearer error handling, with specific messages and guidance on how to resolve them. Better recovery from network or server failures.

fixes.upload_modal: Fixed vertical scrolling in the upload results modal and better visualization of long photo lists.
fixes.map_visibility: Solution to problems with the display of the satellite layer and other map styles on different devices.
fixes.mobile_experience: Fixes in navigation, menus, and forms to improve the experience on mobile devices and tablets.

ui.photo_details: New presentation of photo details with more accessible and visual information about location, date, and labels.
ui.sidebar_compact: Improvements in the compact sidebar with centered icons and better organization of quick access.
ui.responsive_layout: Complete optimization of the adaptive design to ensure an excellent experience on all screen sizes.

features.maps: Create custom maps from your favorite photos. Share your collections with other users and group your memories by themes.
features.location_selector: New component for selecting locations with optimized search. Includes autocomplete and regional grouping.
features.avatar_upload: Now you can upload and customize your profile avatar. Supports interactive cropping and real-time preview.
features.search: Advanced filters to find photos by date, location, and tags. The system saves your recent searches.

improvements.i18n: The application is now fully internationalized in English and Spanish. All texts, messages, and help content are available in both languages.
improvements.gallery_filters: Simplified filter interface in the Gallery for a more intuitive experience, removing rarely used advanced filters.
improvements.help_center: Enhanced Help Center with complete documentation and rich formatting for better readability.

fixes.text_format: Fixed text formatting throughout the application, ensuring that bold text and other styles display correctly.
fixes.pagination: Solved an issue where numbers in the paginator weren't correctly displayed in bold.
fixes.search_placeholder: Help texts in search fields now display in the user's selected language.

ui.theme_update: Complete theme redesign using more harmonious color palettes. Better contrast and accessibility in dark and light modes.
ui.sidebar_improvement: More intuitive sidebar with shortcuts to frequent sections. Supports expanded and collapsed modes to maximize space.
ui.dropdowns: Unified selection components throughout the application with support for search, keyboard, and touch navigation.
ui.animations: Smooth transitions between views and microinteractions to enhance user experience.
ui.responsive: Better adaptation to mobile devices and tablets with improved touch controls.

features.photo_upload: Upload your photos with support for metadata and automatic geolocation.
features.gallery: Browse your photos with filters by date, location, and categories.
features.photo_map: Visualize your memories on an interactive map with zone grouping.
features.user_profile: Profile management with statistics and custom settings.
features.on_this_day: Relive memories from previous years on the same day.

ui.responsive_design: Interface adaptable to any device, from mobile to large screens.
ui.theme_support: Support for light and dark themes with smooth transitions between them.
ui.map_integration: Interactive maps with different layers and customizable styles.
ui.modern_design: Clean and modern interface focused on usability and accessibility.
ui.reusable_components: Consistent design system throughout the application.
